items.evidence: 2026-06-15 business module API/layout smoke passed 53/53 and the latest Playwright browser page smoke on http://10.11.100.17:18080 passed 53/53 with no visible error, network error, console error, page error, or request failure. Production-related entries included WOM make task, WOM retirement PDA, RM batch formula, craftGraph, WTS work permit, and workAppointment work plan. Reports: /tmp/adp-business-module-smoke-20260615184508.json and /tmp/adp-business-page-smoke-final-20260615204003/business-page-smoke-results.json. This proves route/API/page reachability only; action-level persistence remains untested.

items.verificationSql: select id, user_name, coalesce(person_id::text,''), coalesce(person_code,''), coalesce(person_name,''), coalesce(company_id::text,''), coalesce(valid::text,''), coalesce(user_type::text,''), coalesce(description,''), coalesce(time_zone,''), coalesce(has_lock::text,''), left(coalesce(password,''), 4), length(coalesce(password,''))::text from public.auth_user where user_name = 'adp_e2e_20260615150418_auth_user' order by create_time desc nulls last, id desc;

Report: /tmp/adp-auth-user-persistence-acceptance.json; screenshot: /tmp/adp-auth-user-persistence-20260615150418/auth-user-persistence.png. First real acceptance exposed PostgreSQL missing column auth_user.error_count during unlock. deploy/docker/postgres/init/073-auth-user-lock-status-compat.sql was added and applied to the remote PostgreSQL database, then make acceptance-auth-user-persistence passed. Final PUT /status with lock=false returned 200 and PostgreSQL auth_user.has_lock changed to 0 for user adp_e2e_20260615150418_auth_user.

items.evidence: Real browser opened /auth/#/user with navigation status 200. No visible error, console error, page error, or request failure. Report: /tmp/adp-auth-user-persistence-acceptance.json; screenshot: /tmp/adp-auth-user-persistence-20260615150418/auth-user-persistence.png. Browser-context same-origin DELETE returned 200 for auth_user id 6587988858225168. PostgreSQL retained auth_user with valid=0, cleared org_person.user_id/user_name, and auth_user_role count was 0. Cleanup then deleted prerequisite person id 6587988816478736, leaving org_person.valid=0.

items.operation: 定位新建生产工单或制造任务入口
items.api: POST /msService/WOM/produceTask/produceTask/makeTaskList-pending (query only; no create endpoint observed)
items.backendEntry: not entered: current route exposed only list/query UI, no create action; runtime view layoutDatagrid.buttons is empty
items.evidence: Latest real browser discovery opened WOM makeTaskList with navigation status 200 and no visible/network/console/page/request errors. Visible buttons were 查询, 仅查待办, 清空; no safe 新增/新建/添加/创建 button was present. Only non-GET request was list query POST /msService/WOM/produceTask/produceTask/makeTaskList-pending. Read model identifies WOM_PRODUCE_TASKS and wfm_task_pending, but create write table is not accepted until a create route is found. Report: /tmp/adp-production-action-discovery-final8-20260615204438/production-action-discovery.json.
issues: Current WOM makeTaskList route appears to be a pending-task/list page, not the production work-order creation entry.
Runtime compatibility view exposes no grid buttons, so the current rendered page cannot initiate create.
Need to locate the real create page, menu permission, or button authority source before marker-based persistence acceptance can run.

items.operation: 生产状态流转、备料生成、报工、活动开始/结束等写动作落库验收
items.api: POST /msService/WOM/produceTask/produceTask/updateTaskState; POST /msService/WOM/produceTask/produceTask/addOutputByOutPutDetails; POST /msService/WOM/produceTask/produceTask/generatePrepareNeed; GET /msService/WOM/produceTask/produceTask/startActive; GET /msService/WOM/produceTask/produceTask/endActive; POST /msService/WOM/produceTask/produceTask/endEasyActive/{id}
items.backendEntry: WOMProduceTaskController -> WOMProduceTaskServiceImpl methods traced from WOM_6.1.3.4 source; layoutJson backend path now returns 200 after runtime_extra_view patch, but frontend edit/view renderer still fails before any write request
items.evidence: Source action map identifies production write endpoints and target tables. Direct layoutJson verification now returns 200 for makeTaskEdit/makeTaskSubmitView/makeTaskView/makeTaskBatchView/easyTaskOperateView, with pageType EDIT/VIEW, DataGridCode, and real produceTask field keys. However the latest real browser discovery still shows action pages caught by ErrorBoundary with React error #130; no buttons, fields, or write requests are available. Report: /tmp/adp-production-action-discovery-final8-20260615204438/production-action-discovery.json. makeTaskGraphList still returns document 404. No marker write action was executed.
issues: layoutJson 500 is fixed for the WOM action views, but the generated action-view component tree is still incompatible with the desktop greenDill React renderer.
The action pages expose no buttons or form fields after render because ErrorBoundary catches React error #130.
Cannot execute marker-based write operation from the real frontend until the real edit/view layout/component metadata is recovered, not only list-style datagrid JSON.
Current production list pages still do not expose the source-defined action buttons.

API returned 200 with id 6587841746223632. PostgreSQL org_position row existed with valid=1, dep_id=1, full_path=/默认公司/ADP_E2E_20260615134928_POS, lay_rec=6587841746223632, and the create marker description. org_position_mnecode had generated rows.
